welcome_title: Welcome to the Balloon Analogue Risk Task
welcome_p1: This task measures your propensity for risk-taking. You will see a series of balloons on the screen.
welcome_p2: For every pump you earn 5 cents in a temporary bank — but each pump also brings the balloon closer to popping. If a balloon pops, you lose all the money in that temporary bank. Press Collect at any time to bank the money and move to the next balloon.
welcome_p3: You will see {{count}} balloons in total. The session takes about 5–8 minutes.
tutorial_step1_text: Click the Pump button to inflate the balloon. Each pump adds 5 cents to a temporary bank.
tutorial_step2_text: Click Collect at any time to transfer the temporary money to your permanent total and move on to the next balloon.
tutorial_step3_text: Each balloon pops at a different point. If it pops before you collect, you lose everything in the temporary bank for that balloon.
tutorial_step4_text: Balloons come in blue, yellow and orange. Different colors have different average breaking points — try to figure out how far you can push each one.
demo_intro: Watch how a balloon trial unfolds.
demo_step1: A new balloon appears. Your temporary bank is empty.
demo_step2: Pumping inflates the balloon and adds money to the temporary bank.
demo_step3: The balloon grows larger and the temporary bank holds more money.
demo_step4: Pressing Collect banks the money and starts a new balloon.
demo_step5: If you push too hard, the balloon pops and the temporary money is lost.
demo_step6: You understand how it works. Ready to practice?
practice_complete_text1: Well done! You're ready for the real test.
practice_complete_text2: Remember: there is no single correct strategy — try to maximize what you bank.
countdown_instruction: Click Pump to inflate the balloon. Click Collect to bank your money.
results_adj_pumps_note: Adjusted average pumps = average number of pumps on balloons that did NOT explode. This is the standard riskiness index from Lejuez et al. (2002).
settings_total_balloons_desc: Total balloons presented in the test (90 in the original BART).
settings_mixed_trials_desc: Number of initial balloons presented in a random color mix. Remaining balloons are presented in same-color blocks.
settings_pump_value_desc: Money added to the temporary bank with each pump.
settings_show_earnings_desc: Display the total and last-balloon earnings while playing.
settings_enable_sounds_desc: Play pump, collect, and pop sounds.
settings_countdown_desc: Countdown shown before the test begins.
footer_description: A behavioral measure of risk-taking propensity using a balloon-pumping paradigm.
